evals.name: scope-inference-from-path
evals.prompt: I just edited src/templates/00-blank/Composition.tsx to add a fade-in animation on the title text. Please write the git commit message for this change.
evals.expected_output: A Conventional Commits message of the form `feat(00-blank): <single English sentence>`. Type should be `feat`. Scope should be inferred as `00-blank` from the file path. Description should be one concise English imperative sentence describing the fade-in animation.

evals.name: chinese-trigger-reject-wip
evals.prompt: 幫我 commit 這個 wip 的修改：我改了 src/Root.tsx，重新命名了 import 路徑。
evals.expected_output: Skill should trigger despite Chinese phrasing. Output should reject 'wip' and produce a proper Conventional Commits message — likely `refactor: <description>` or `refactor(root): <description>` describing the rename. Description should be single English sentence, imperative mood.
